name: Brainfork Memory
description: Brainfork-backed recall, decision capture, and workspace memory sync

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject a bounded Brainfork memory block before agent runs

autoIndex.label: Auto Index
autoIndex.help: Sync MEMORY.md and memory/**/*.md on agent end

captureDecisions.label: Capture Decisions
captureDecisions.help: Detect durable decisions from conversations and log them to Brainfork

similarityThreshold.label: Similarity Threshold
similarityThreshold.help: Minimum similarity score to keep when building auto-recall context

deleteMode.label: Delete Mode
deleteMode.help: How removed local docs should reconcile in Brainfork

searchMode.label: Search Mode
searchMode.help: Default search mode for auto-recall: search (BM25), vsearch (vector), or query (hybrid+rerank)

requestTimeoutMs.label: Request Timeout
requestTimeoutMs.help: Abort Brainfork MCP requests that exceed this timeout in milliseconds
